cinematic_comedy_bright.story_notes: funny but visually polished, bright timing, expressive reaction shots, dynamic cut rhythm
cinematic_comedy_bright.camera_notes: alternate wide setup shots with tight punchline closeups, occasional high-angle comedy beat, occasional low-angle exaggeration
cinematic_comedy_bright.color_grade: warm bright, clean contrast, cheerful highlight rolloff

stylized_romcom.camera_notes: push-ins, soft closeups, romantic reversals, elegant profile shots
stylized_romcom.color_grade: soft pastel highlights, warm skin tones

soft_bridal_windowlight.camera_notes: slow cinematic motion, wide-to-close reveal, macro lace detail, intimate face shots
soft_bridal_windowlight.color_grade: creamy whites, soft gold, low contrast

high_fashion_editorial.camera_notes: dramatic angles, strong silhouettes, low-angle power, detail shots, structured visual rhythm

dark_comedy_cinematic.camera_notes: awkward wide shots mixed with sudden closeups and visual irony
